case_title: PAN, PATRICK VS TYSON, PHYLISS M. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $920.00 FILED BY PAN, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT TYSON, PHYLISS M. DENNIS, CLIFFORD M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DENNIS, CLIFFORD M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAN, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TYSON, PHYLISS M. DENNIS, CLIFFORD M. $920.00 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $977.00, CONTINUANCE REQUEST DENIED. NO NOTICE TO PLFT. ONE DAY NOTICE TO COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TYSON, PHYLISS M. DENNIS, CLIFFORD M.
